title: urochloa lata
intro: Urochloa lata, also known as Panicum lata, is a species of grass native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Urochloa lata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Urochloa lata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
